query:
INSERT INTO citizenDelegates (userId, ministryId, delegateId, delegateUserId, votingMethod, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  FLOOR(RAND() * 100) + 1 as userId,
  m.id as ministryId,
  NULL as delegateId,
  FLOOR(RAND() * 100) + 1 as delegateUserId,
  'citizen' as votingMethod,
  NOW() as createdAt,
  NOW() as updatedAt
FROM (SELECT 150001 as id UNION SELECT 150002) m
CROSS JOIN (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 
            UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10) x
LIMIT 50
